title: Automating UI Testing Workflows
description: Practical steps to automate UI test workflows so they run reliably and provide fast feedback.

title: Practical UI Test Automation — A Short Tutorial
description: A concise, hands-on tutorial to write a reliable UI test from scratch and make it part of your workflow.

title: Tightening Testing Feedback Loops
description: Short reflection on why fast feedback matters and practical ways to tighten your testing feedback loop.

title: Testing as a Risk Model
description: Reframe testing as risk management—prioritize what matters and communicate uncertainty clearly.

title: Designing Reliable UI Tests
description: Practical principles for UI tests that don't flake, don't slow you down, and actually catch bugs.

title: Confidence vs Defect Counting
description: Why the best measure of testing success isn't how many bugs you find—it's how much confidence you create.
